title: 6 - All Seasons Heather Plant Collection - Mixed Collection - Evergreen Shrubs - Pot Plants
features: Heathers all season Flowering Collection provides a fun, effective and colourful mixture of summer flowering Heathers, offering an increasing display every year.
Heathers will grow well in full sun or light shade.
These are very low maintenance plants, and their brilliant colours brighten the summer months and give several months of pleasure.
Supplied in 9cm square plant pots, image used is for display only and shows mature plants.
Collours and types may be different from ones shown
description: Heathers Summer Flowering Collection provides a fun, effective and colourful mixture of summer flowering Heathers, offering an increasing display every year.
